Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: flatweaves [300186954], rugs by technique [300186946], rugs (textiles) [300185749], coverings and hangings by form [300185748], coverings and hangings by specific type [300185832], coverings and hangings [300205012], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Tapestry-woven rugs produced in the Islamic lands of western Central Asia, the Middle East, the Balkans and North Africa.
In tapijtwerk uitgevoerde kleden afkomstig uit de islamitische landen van het westelijk deel van Centraal-Azië en uit het Midden-Oosten, de Balkan en Noord-Afrika.
在中亞西部、中東、巴爾幹半島與北非的伊斯蘭教地區所製作之分色換梭織毯。
Gewebter Teppich, der in islamischen Ländern im westlichen Zentralasien, im Mittleren Osten, auf dem Balkan und in Nordafrika hergestellt wird.

Term_Source.Page: 14, Source says term is mostly folklore and that there's no proof that any rug can be assoc. with term.
